description: Operate SendFox contacts, lists, campaigns, audience hygiene, CSV reconciliation, launch checklists, signup-form handoffs, and webhook setup packets from the terminal.

novel_features.name: Capabilities Matrix
novel_features.description: Machine-readable support matrix that tells agents which SendFox resources can be listed, created, or only handled in the dashboard.

novel_features.name: Account Snapshot
novel_features.description: One read-only operating snapshot across /me, lists, contacts, and campaigns.

novel_features.name: Audience Map
novel_features.description: Map contacts to lists and surface contacts without list memberships for segmentation cleanup.

novel_features.name: Hygiene Report
novel_features.description: Find duplicate emails, invalid emails, status mix, and list-membership gaps from live contacts.

novel_features.name: Launch Plan
novel_features.description: Generate a safe SendFox list-launch checklist and exact next CLI/dashboard steps without faking campaign write endpoints.

novel_features.name: Campaign Digest
novel_features.description: Summarize campaign count, status mix, and recent campaigns.

novel_features.name: Contacts Audit CSV
novel_features.description: Validate subscriber CSVs for invalid and duplicate emails before any mutation.

novel_features.name: Contacts Reconcile CSV
novel_features.description: Compare a CSV against live contacts and emit create/skip actions before bulk import.

novel_features.name: Contacts Onboard
novel_features.description: Create a contact and attach list memberships in one automation-aware command with dry-run call preview.

novel_features.name: Contacts Import CSV
novel_features.description: Bulk-create contacts from CSV after a required dry-run/--yes safety gate.

novel_features.name: Forms Generate
novel_features.description: Generate a self-contained signup form handoff with server-side SendFox proxy guidance.

novel_features.name: Webhooks Handoff
novel_features.description: Generate dashboard setup and handler-contract packets for SendFox webhook receivers.
